# Giorgio Rivolta

> Official website of Giorgio Rivolta, PMP-certified Project Manager specialising in Cloud, Data Analytics and Artificial Intelligence.

## About

This website contains my professional profile, work experience, certifications, technical expertise and selected projects.

## Main topics

- Project Management
- PMP
- Scrum
- Cloud Computing
- Microsoft Azure
- Google Cloud
- AWS
- VMware
- Artificial Intelligence
- Data Analytics
- Digital Transformation
